source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Sturdy archive English UI with Japanese typography guidance for labels, records, tables, map-like notes, command search, audit logs, and long-term data panels.
layout: Dense archive dashboards, stratified sidebars, 8px radii, clay-red primary actions, shadow-blue focus states, cream surfaces, dry-umber dividers, and subtle eroded sediment texture.

prompts.label: Transparent badlands stripes motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Badlands transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete badlands stripes motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a cutout on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A sculptural eroded prairie badlands formation, compact freestanding landform with horizontal sediment stripes, clay red bands, cream chalk layers, dusty umber ridges, and cool shadow-blue creases in gullies. Tactile dry earth, crumbly clay edges, stratified archive-like layers, rugged but precise silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, full landform visible without cropping; no horizon line, no sky, no plants, no animals, no props.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural sediment color and texture, no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no landscape background, no second subject, no generic canyon vista, no saturated rainbow layers.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Badlands light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Badlands, derived from the visible badlands stripe motif cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif image: clay red sediment bands, cream chalk layers, dusty prairie neutrals, rugged umber ridges, and cool shadow-blue gullies. The board must visibly respect the motif colors.
Canvas: exact 16:9 design-system presentation intended for 3840 x 2160 final use; large readable labels; precise grid; no tiny dense token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Badlands, Badlands Stripes, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Typography: sturdy archive/product English UI with Japanese typography guidance for labels, records, tables, map-like notes, command search, and audit panels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Style/medium: premium rugged archive system, shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, tactile stratified paper and eroded-clay texture, restrained professional surfaces, 8px radii, crisp components.
Color palette: clay red, cream, shadow blue, chalk white, dry umber, prairie dust, shale ink; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Text: use short readable UI labels; include the exact title "Morphous Badlands" and motif label "Badlands Stripes".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no marketing hero layout, no stock-photo canyon background, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Badlands.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Badlands dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Badlands that feels like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible badlands motif and light design-system board as references. Preserve clay red primary actions, cream/chalk typography contrast, shadow-blue focus and info states, dry umber panels, shale-ink navigation, prairie dust dividers, stratified texture rhythm, 8px radii, and rugged archive-system structure.
Canvas: exact 16:9 design-system presentation intended for 3840 x 2160 final use; polished professional board; large readable labels; no dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Badlands, Badlands Stripes, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Typography: sturdy archive/product English UI with Japanese guidance for dark records, tables, command search, audit logs, map-like layer notes, and long-term record panels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from shale ink and cool shadow blue, cream chalk foregrounds, dry umber elevated panels, clay red action and destructive states, subtle eroded-strata texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp shadcn-style controls.
Text: use short readable UI labels; include the exact title "Morphous Badlands" and "Dark Mode".
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated purple gradients, no stock-photo canyon background, no illegible text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Badlands.
